basic_details.job_title: IIFT Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Corporate Relations & Placement Coordinator Posts
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Foreign Trade (IIFT) Corporate Relations & Placement Coordinator Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://www.iift.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIFT Corporate Relations & Placement Coordinator Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: MBA/ PGDBM/ M.A. (Economics) from a recognized Institution/ University with 50% marks or equivalent CGPA. At least five years of successful experience as Placement Officer/ Manager or Placement Head, Training and Placement Officer at any Institute of National importance or a premier business school with a strong corporate network OR At least seven (07) years of experience as HR/ Marketing Head, senior HR level with a prestigious corporate brand with a good network with HR professionals in the industry at top-level who take decisions in the area of talent acquisitions and campus placements in particular.
qualification.details: MBA/ PGDBM/ M.A. (Economics) from a recognized Institution/ University with 50% marks or equivalent CGPA. Excellent oral and written communication skills in English (Spoken & written). At least five years of successful experience as Placement Officer/ Manager or Placement Head, Training and Placement Officer at any Institute of National importance or a premier business school with a strong corporate network OR At least seven (07) years of experience as HR/ Marketing Head, senior HR level with a prestigious corporate brand with a good network with HR professionals in the industry at top-level who take decisions in the area of talent acquisitions and campus placements in particular. Ability to develop a sound, credible reciprocal relations with industry with good PR, liaison and relationship-building skills, ability to facilitate and promote industry/ institute through the talent pool of the students of IIFT.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIFT Corporate Relations & Placement Coordinator Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIFT to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIFT Corporate Relations & Placement Coordinator post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the IIFT Corporate Relations & Placement Coordinator position is 15th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBA/ PGDBM/ M.A. (Economics) from a recognized institution with at least 50% marks or equivalent CGPA.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Corporate Relations & Placement Coordinator role is 55 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for this position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 1,00,000/- to Rs. 1,50,000/-.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Corporate Relations & Placement Coordinator post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Corporate Relations & Placement Coordinator position at IIFT.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for this recruitment must be submitted through the online mode only.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category of candidates in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Corporate Relations & Placement Coordinator role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q9. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The job is located in Kolkata, West Bengal, with the pincode 700107.

faq.question: Q10. Does IIFT offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify any age relaxation details for reserved categories.
